assertions.assertion: Output calls AddClientCredentialsTokenManagement() to register the token management services
Output calls AddClient() with configuration including TokenEndpoint, ClientId, ClientSecret, and Scope
assertions.rationale: `.AddClient("catalog-worker", client => {...})` sets TokenEndpoint, ClientId, ClientSecret, and Scope.

assertions.assertion: Output registers an HTTP client using AddClientCredentialsHttpClient or AddClientCredentialsTokenHandler with the client name
Output shows a BackgroundService or worker class that uses IHttpClientFactory.CreateClient to make API calls without manual token code
assertions.rationale: CatalogWorker extends BackgroundService, injects IHttpClientFactory, and calls `factory.CreateClient("catalog-api")` with no manual token code.

assertions.assertion: Output uses v4 strongly-typed ClientCredentialsClientName.Parse() for the client name (not a raw string)
assertions.rationale: Code uses `ClientCredentialsClientName.Parse("catalog-worker")` when registering the HTTP client.
